title: My End
content:
Half hands hold my fate.
    Where will it sink...
    My steps are tiny, like those of a woman.
    One evening lay waste all dreams.
    Sleep does not come to me -
meaning:
Alfred Lichtenstein's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "My End"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
